name: Get-History

options.name: -Count
options.description: Specifies the number of the most recent history entries that this cmdlet gets. By, default, `Get-History` gets all entries in the session history. If you use both the Count and Id parameters in a command, the display ends with the command that is specified by the Id parameter.

options.name: -Id
options.description: Specifies an array of the IDs of entries in the session history. `Get-History` gets only specified entries. If you use both the Id and Count parameters in a command, `Get-History` gets the most recent entries ending with the entry specified by the Id parameter.

description: Gets a list of the commands entered during the current session.
